queries.title: Architecture Overview
queries.query: What is the overall architecture of this codebase? List the main components, their responsibilities, and how they interact.

queries.title: Data Flow Analysis
queries.query: Trace the data flow from input processing to final output. What transformations happen at each stage?

queries.title: Error Handling Strategy
queries.query: How does the codebase handle errors? What are the error handling patterns used throughout?

queries.title: External Dependencies
queries.query: What are the critical external dependencies? What would break if one of them changes?

queries.title: Test Coverage Areas
queries.query: What areas of the codebase are well-tested? What areas lack test coverage?

queries.title: Refactoring Opportunities
queries.query: Which modules are good candidates for refactoring? Why?

queries.title: Security Concerns
queries.query: Are there any potential security vulnerabilities or risky patterns in this codebase?

queries.title: Performance Analysis
queries.query: What are potential performance bottlenecks in this codebase?
